query: UPDATE index_history ih SET signalCount = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals s WHERE s.territoryId = ih.territoryId AND DATE_FORMAT(s.publishedAt, '%Y-%m') = ih.period), relevantSignalCount = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals s WHERE s.territoryId = ih.territoryId AND DATE_FORMAT(s.publishedAt, '%Y-%m') = ih.period AND s.curationStatus IN ('relevant', 'analyzed'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2aGV9vQqnMXZ7WH.b5ed6992562a --database 43iZsmPphrqUoXjRK5zrxR --execute UPDATE index_history ih SET signalCount = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals s WHERE s.territoryId = ih.territoryId AND DATE_FORMAT(s.publishedAt, '%Y-%m') = ih.period), relevantSignalCount = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals s WHERE s.territoryId = ih.territoryId AND DATE_FORMAT(s.publishedAt, '%Y-%m') = ih.period AND s.curationStatus IN ('relevant', 'analyzed'));
